system.powerDescription:
Your body molts and dissolves into a swarm of insects with a total volume up to CAT size. Whilst within this swarm state you are able to use the senses of and finely control each and every bug that you turn into. This swarm may include flying insects, poisonous insects, venomous insects, and almost any other type of mundane insect or arachnid. 

The use of blasphemy powers or taking any stress while in this form will instantly convert you back into your normal form wherever the largest concentration of your insects is located. 

Gain or grant +1D whenever you or an ally next take advantage of your swarm.
